<!-- Generated by the data-persona-gap-audit workflow (43 agents, adversarially verified) on 2026-06-27. Companion docs: BULK-OPS-AUDIT.md, CRM-PARITY-HUBSPOT-ZOHO.md. The prioritized issues table + 49 tickets below are the durable source. -->

# AltLeads CRM — Data-Admin & Data-Analyst Capability Audit + Safe Reversible Import/Export Design

*Prepared for: Ankit (PM). Scope: two personas — DATA-ADMIN (bulk upload/edit, data quality, fixing mistakes) and DATA-ANALYST (reporting, segmentation, dashboards, exports). Stack: React 19 + Vite + TypeScript + Supabase (Postgres + RLS + PostgREST), Express notify-service (service-role).*

---

## 1. Executive summary

AltLeads today has a **read/export half of the data-ops story and almost none of the write/recover half.** Verified against the codebase:

- **Export works** and is reasonably mature: it leads every file with a stable **Record-ID column** so the sheet round-trips (`ExportButton.tsx:99-105`), and the list pages already pass the *visible* column set into it (Companies/Contacts/Leads), so "export respects my columns" is in fact **shipped**, not a gap. Multi-column sort and server-side pagination are also already present on the list grids per the corrected verdicts.
- **But export is 100% client-side** (`ExportButton.tsx:117-154`) — no server round-trip, **no audit of who exported which PII, no CSV-injection neutralisation** (it only quotes `[",\n]` at line 142, never neutralises leading `= + - @`), and it silently exports whatever the browser managed to load.
- **There is no import engine at all.** The notify-service exposes exactly 6 routes (`server.js:686,718,771,941,1054,1219`) — none is a bulk-update/import endpoint. The spec exists (`BULK-IMPORT-EXPORT.md`) but zero implementation.
- **There is no delete/archive, no recycle bin, and merge is dead code.** `MergeDuplicatesModal.tsx` is defined (`:91`) but **never imported by any page** — confirmed by grep. `deleted_date`/`deleted_by` columns exist and are *read-filtered* across the data layer, but **no UI write sets them**, so soft-delete and restore are both unbuilt.
- **Audit captures who/when but not old→new.** `appendInteraction` (`projectStatus.ts:104-114`) writes `type`/`note_text`/`created_by` only; `describeChange` (`:130-142`) builds a free-text summary, never a reversible `{field, old, new}` diff. So **no field-level history and no undo foundation exist.**

**The headline ask — one-button UNDO + one-button REDO with a persisted import/export history log — is genuinely missing and is a real differentiator** (no major competitor ships REDO). It is buildable, but the *write/revert* core is **coupled to the launch blocker** (`created_by != assignee`; assignee-RLS resolves through a sparse `profiles` table). Anything that writes non-owned rows must go through a **service-role notify-service endpoint** (the `requireAdmin` pattern already used at `server.js:771,941,1054`), which sidesteps RLS cleanly and is the correct home for the whole engine.

**What you can ship this week with zero blocker exposure:** the import **mapping/preview wizard UI**, progress/cancel on existing bulk loops, the bulk-action **audit-receipt + history** view, **CSV-injection hardening**, **PII-export gating + export-respects-columns polish**, a **recycle-bin read+restore page** (restore is a narrow admin write, low blast radius), a **report/pivot builder**, **named saved segments**, **calculated columns**, **funnel/conversion analytics**, and a **data-quality command center**. These are pure-frontend or read-only and are the right first wave.

---

## 2. Designing the SAFE REVERSIBLE import/export with one-button UNDO + REDO + history log

This is the user-flagged headline. Here is the concrete, Supabase-native design.

### 2.1 Goal

Every bulk mutation (import, re-import, bulk field-edit, bulk set-status, bulk reassign, single/bulk delete) becomes a **batch** that captures a **before-image of every row it touched**, so that:

- **UNDO** restores every touched row to its before-image (added rows are soft-deleted; updated rows are reverted field-by-field) — recorded as a *new* batch.
- **REDO** re-applies the original batch — also recorded as a *new* batch.
- An **Import/Export History page** lists every batch (actor, time, file, mode, create/update/skip/error counts) with Undo/Redo/Re-download actions.

### 2.2 Data model (3 new tables)

```
data_batch
  batch_id        bigserial PK
  kind            text   -- 'import' | 'reimport' | 'bulk_edit' | 'set_status'
                         --        | 'reassign' | 'delete' | 'undo' | 'redo' | 'export'
  entity          text   -- 'company'|'contact'|'lead'|'meeting'|'task'|'wishlist'
  actor_user_id   bigint REFERENCES user_master(user_id)
  source_file     text   NULL   -- original filename for imports
  mode            text   NULL   -- 'create'|'update_only'|'upsert'
  reason          text   NULL   -- mandatory-justification capture (critic add)
  counts          jsonb         -- {created, updated, skipped, errored}
  status          text          -- 'committed'|'undone'|'redone'|'failed'
  parent_batch_id bigint NULL REFERENCES data_batch  -- undo/redo links to origin
  created_at      timestamptz default now()

data_batch_row            -- the before/after snapshot, one row per touched record
  batch_id        bigint REFERENCES data_batch
  record_type     text
  record_id       bigint
  op              text   -- 'insert'|'update'|'soft_delete'
  before_image    jsonb  NULL  -- full prior row (NULL for inserts)
  after_image     jsonb  NULL  -- applied values (NULL for deletes)
  PRIMARY KEY (batch_id, record_type, record_id)

export_log               -- export side of the history
  export_id       bigserial PK
  actor_user_id   bigint REFERENCES user_master(user_id)
  entity          text
  columns         jsonb        -- the exact column set
  filter_json     jsonb        -- enables "replay this export"
  row_count       int
  pii_included    boolean
  created_at      timestamptz default now()
```

Plus a lightweight stamp on the live rows themselves (ties into data-lineage tickets): `source text` (`manual|import|api|migration`) and `import_batch_id bigint` on each entity, set on every write — so a single upload can later be isolated and reverted even outside the wizard.

### 2.3 Where the work runs (and the blocker boundary)

| Component | Runs where | Blocker-coupled? |
|---|---|---|
| Upload + header parse + auto-map + 3-row preview | **Browser** (frontend) | **No — build now** |
| Dry-run diff (create/update/skip/error classification) | Browser computes against fetched keys, OR server | **No** if read-only preview |
| **Commit / re-import write** | **notify-service service-role endpoint** `POST /api/:entity/bulk-update` | **Yes** — writes non-owned rows; needs service-role (already the `requireAdmin` pattern) — bypasses assignee-RLS cleanly |
| Snapshot before-image into `data_batch_row` | Inside the same endpoint, same transaction | Yes (with the write) |
| **UNDO / REDO** apply | Same service-role endpoint, replays `before_image`/`after_image` | Yes |
| Import/Export **History page** (list batches) | Browser reads `data_batch` / `export_log` | **No — read-only, build now** (read is admin-only, not assignee-RLS) |
| Export **audit row** write | notify-service (so it's tamper-resistant) | Mild — a self-scoped insert, not a non-owned write |

**Key architectural call:** because every write goes through one **service-role** endpoint, the `created_by != assignee` RLS blocker does **not** block the *engine itself* — service-role ignores RLS. What the blocker *does* gate is whether an **AGENT** (non-admin) can trigger these on records they don't own. So: build the **admin-scoped** engine now behind `requireAdmin`; the *agent-facing* "edit records assigned to me" path waits on the ownership fix. This lets you ship the admin import/undo/redo without waiting.

### 2.4 UNDO / REDO semantics (the differentiator)

- **Undo an import:** for each `data_batch_row` where `op='insert'` → set `deleted_date=now()` (soft-delete the added row). For `op='update'` → write `before_image` back. Record it as a new `data_batch(kind='undo', parent_batch_id=<orig>)`. Set origin `status='undone'`.
- **Redo:** re-apply `after_image` (re-insert / re-update / un-soft-delete). New `data_batch(kind='redo')`. Origin `status='redone'`.
- **Re-import keying:** match on the shipped **Record-ID column** first (`ExportButton.tsx:99-105` already guarantees it's present), fallback `email` / `domain_clean` / `linkedin_clean`.
- **Don't-overwrite-with-blank guard:** per-column "fill blanks only" flag; on update, skip a cell if incoming is blank and existing is non-blank — protects rep-entered data during enrichment passes.

### 2.5 What is buildable now vs blocked, for THIS feature

- **NOW (no blocker):** mapping/preview wizard, dry-run diff *display*, History page (read), export-log read + "replay export" UI, CSV-injection hardening on the export path, the `data_batch`/`export_log` schema migration.
- **NEEDS service-role endpoint (build now, admin-only) — engine core:** commit write, before-image snapshot, undo, redo. Buildable immediately *as an admin tool* via `requireAdmin`; it only becomes blocker-bound when you want **agents** to run it on assigned-but-not-owned records.
- **NEEDS ownership fix first:** agent-initiated bulk edits/deletes on non-owned rows, and accurate `actor` attribution (audit columns are `varchar` user-ids with no FK — `SCHEMA-AUDIT.md S1`).

---

## 3. Capability matrix

### 3.1 DATA-ADMIN

| Capability | HubSpot | Zoho | Salesforce | AltLeads now | Gap |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| CSV/Excel import (create/update/upsert) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (Wizard + Data Loader) | ❌ none (`server.js` 6 routes) | **P0** |
| Column-to-field mapping + preview | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | P1 (buildable now) |
| Re-import keyed on Record ID | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (External ID) | ⚠️ ID column exported, no import | P0 |
| Don't-overwrite-with-blank guard | ✅ | ✅ | — | ❌ | P1 |
| Partial-success + error-rows file | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | P1 |
| Import dry-run diff / preview counts | ✅ | ✅ | — | ❌ | P1 |
| Import rollback (undo a batch) | ✅ 14d | ✅ 30d | ✅ (created-date) | ❌ | P0 |
| **One-button UNDO + REDO** | partial (undo only) | partial | partial | ❌ | **P0 — differentiator** |
| Single/bulk delete or archive (UI) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (cols exist, no write) | P1 |
| Recycle bin: list + restore | ✅ 90d | ✅ 60d | ✅ 15d | ❌ | P1 (read+restore buildable now) |
| Hard-delete / purge + retention window | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | P1 (GDPR/DPDP) |
| Merge duplicates (atomic, survivorship) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ dead code (`MergeDuplicatesModal` never imported) | P1 |
| Duplicate prevention at write/import | ✅ Dup Rules | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ create-only, no UNIQUE | P1 |
| Generalized bulk field-edit (all entities) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ status/project only, no Leads | P1 |
| Progress bar + cancel on bulk ops | ✅ | — | ✅ Bulk API | ❌ (sync for-loops) | P1 (buildable now) |
| Count-confirm before bulk action | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (`BulkStatusModal`, `ReassignModal`) | — done |
| Bulk-action audit receipt + history | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ per-row only, no batch log | P1 (buildable now) |
| PII export gating + export audit | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (client-side, raw PII) | P1 |
| Consent / DNC / opt-out fields | ✅ | ✅ | — | ❌ | P1 (India DPDP/TRAI) |
| Mandatory reason on sensitive ops | ✅ Shield | — | ✅ | ❌ | P2 (buildable now) |

### 3.2 DATA-ANALYST

| Capability | HubSpot | Zoho | Salesforce | AltLeads now | Gap |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| No-code report / pivot builder | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ Matrix | ❌ (hardcoded `DashboardPage`) | P1 (buildable now) |
| Customizable dashboards (KPIs/tiles) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (5 fixed KPIs) | P2 (buildable now) |
| Funnel / conversion / time-in-stage | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ counts + bar only | P2 (buildable now) |
| Calculated / derived fields | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (static columns) | P2 (buildable now) |
| Named saved filters / segments | ✅ Active/Static | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (column prefs only) | P1 (buildable now) |
| Multi-column sort in list views | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (per corrected verdict) | — done |
| Export respects visible columns | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (list pages pass visible cols) | — done |
| Server-side search/pagination | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (per corrected verdict) | — done |
| Scheduled / recurring exports (email) | — | ✅ | ✅ subscriptions | ❌ (no job runner) | P2 |
| Replay a saved export config | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (no export_log) | P2 (buildable now w/ log) |
| Field-level change history (old→new) | ✅ | ✅ Audit | ✅ Field History | ⚠️ who/when only | P1 (render buildable now) |
| Read-only API / webhooks for BI | ✅ private apps | ✅ REST | ✅ | ❌ | P2 |
| Data-quality command center | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ dup detector only | P2 (buildable now) |

## 4. Prioritized issues table

> *Dropped per adversarial verdict (already exists): "Count-confirmation modal" (full), "Export respects visible columns" (full). Corrected statuses applied below.*

| Title | Persona | Severity | Depends-on-blocker | Buildable-now | Proposed solution |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Safe reversible import/export + one-button UNDO + REDO + history log | admin | P0 | Yes (write core) | No (engine) / partial (UI+history now) | `data_batch`/`data_batch_row`/`export_log` + service-role `/api/:entity/bulk-update` capturing before-images; undo reverts, redo re-applies, both as new batches |
| CSV/Excel import + re-import engine (create/update-only/upsert, keyed on Record ID) | admin | P0 | Yes | No | Service-role bulk-update endpoint; match on Record-ID → email/domain_clean/linkedin_clean; chunked, dry-run, 207 report |
| Import rollback (undo a specific import batch) | admin | P0 | Yes | No | Stamp `import_batch_id`+before-image; "Undo this import" soft-deletes added, restores updated |
| Column-to-field mapping screen + auto-match + preview | admin | P1 | No | **Yes** | Frontend wizard: parse headers, auto-match, 3-row preview, per-column ignore/remap before submit |
| Import dry-run diff + staged commit (preview counts) | admin | P1 | Yes (commit) | No (preview UI yes) | Non-writing classify pass → "create 120 / update 80 / skip 12 / 5 err" + sample diff; commit on confirm |
| Don't-overwrite-with-blank guard on update imports | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Per-column "fill blanks only" flag in the import engine |
| Partial-success import with downloadable error-rows file | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Endpoint commits valid rows, returns 207; UI offers failed-rows CSV |
| Field-type/format normalization + validation at import | admin | P2 | No | **Yes** | Per-column validate/normalize (email, phone→canonical, URL, fuzzy-map enums) before commit |
| In-flight dedup at import (match preview, not post-hoc) | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Per-row match against domain_clean/email/mobile → skip/update/create decision before commit |
| Recycle bin: list + restore soft-deleted records | admin | P1 | No | **Yes** | Page over `deleted_date IS NOT NULL`; Restore nulls `deleted_date/deleted_by`; admin-only read |
| Single + bulk delete/archive (soft-delete, typed-count confirm) | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Permission-gated soft-delete write behind typed-count modal; recoverable via recycle bin |
| Hard-delete/purge + recycle-bin retention window | admin | P1 | Yes | No | SECURITY DEFINER RPC purge (typed confirm + reason) + auto-expiry job; log every purge |
| Make merge reachable + atomic (wire modal, transactional) | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Mount `MergeDuplicatesModal` from dup detector; move merge into one RPC with survivorship + re-parenting |
| Merge survivorship rules + re-parenting + de-merge | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Per-field choose-winner (keep-non-blank default), re-point all child FKs, store merge record for un-merge |
| Generalized bulk field-edit (any field, all entities incl. Leads) | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Generalize bulk-edit modal to any editable field via service-role endpoint |
| Undo for mass-update / bulk field-edit | admin | P1 | Yes | No | Each bulk edit writes batch + before-image (shared undo machinery) |
| Bulk-action audit receipt + history (batch X changed N) | admin | P1 | No | **Yes** | Write `data_batch` row per batch + viewable history; receipt on completion |
| Partial-failure surfacing + retry-failed-subset | admin | P2 | No | **Yes** | Collect failed IDs+reasons, show list, offer retry-failed / download-failures CSV |
| Progress bar + cancel on bulk operations | admin | P1 | No | **Yes** | Thread `onProgress` + `AbortSignal` through existing loops; progress bar + cancel |
| Duplicate prevention at write time (UNIQUE + alert) | admin | P1 | No | No (needs DB verify) | Partial UNIQUE indexes on normalized keys; run dedup on edit + import |
| Controlled-dropdown/enum enforcement (DB-level) | admin | P1 | No | No (needs DB verify) | Drive all status edits via `dropdown_option`; add CHECK/FK constraints |
| Edit-form validation + DB required-field enforcement | admin | P2 | No | **Yes** | Share create-form validators with edit pages; add NOT NULL/format constraints |
| CSV formula-injection hardening on export | both | P1 | No | **Yes** | Prefix cells starting `= + - @ TAB CR` with `'`; one-file change covers all 5 modules |
| Export audit log + permissioned PII export | both | P1 | No | No (needs server) | Route PII exports through server, record export-audit row, gate full-PII by role |
| Server-streamed full-dataset export + reconciliation count | analyst | P1 | No | **Yes** | Service-role streamed export over full filtered set + "exported N of N" reconciliation |
| PII export gating (mask/restrict by role) | admin | P1 | No | **Yes** | Reuse `contact_master_masked` logic in export; log every export |
| Replay / re-run a saved export configuration | analyst | P2 | No | **Yes** | Persist export config (entity+cols+filter) in `export_log`; replay with identical settings |
| Named saved filters / dynamic + static segments | both | P1 | No | **Yes** | `saved_segment` table (name + filter JSON + dynamic/static); save/recall current filter set |
| No-code custom report / pivot builder | analyst | P1 | No | **Yes** | Pick entity, group-by rows/cols, aggregation, table/chart + drill-down; read-only via PostgREST/RPC |
| Calculated / derived fields (Days-Since, Size-Tier) | analyst | P2 | No | **Yes** | Analyst-defined client-side derived columns (date-diff, tiers, ratios); no schema change |
| Customizable dashboards (KPIs, tiles, filters) | both | P2 | No | **Yes** | Add/remove/reorder KPI tiles, pin saved reports, dashboard date/project filters |
| Funnel / conversion-rate analytics | analyst | P2 | No | **Yes** | Stage drop-off, lead→meeting rate, time-in-stage from existing data; read-only |
| Field-level change history (old→new, who, when, source) | both | P1 | No | **Yes** (render) | `change_history` table written by upserts + import engine; per-record History tab |
| Data-quality command center (dups, missing, formatting) | both | P2 | No | **Yes** | Page summarising dup counts, blank-required counts, normalization issues; reuse detector |
| Consent / DNC / opt-out fields enforced at call + export | both | P1 | No | **Yes** | Add consent_status/do_not_call/opt_out_date/lawful_basis; DNC badge; exclude from call lists/exports |
| Mandatory reason on sensitive ops (delete, mass-edit, PII export, merge) | admin | P2 | No | **Yes** | Required free-text reason stored on the batch audit receipt |
| Contact↔company enrichment auto-fill (domain→firmographics) | admin | P2 | No | **Yes** | On import/create, domain_clean-match to existing company, backfill industry/size/turnover |
| GDPR/DPDP right-to-erasure + DSAR export | admin | P1 | No | No (needs DB verify) | "Forget this contact" cascade pseudonymize/erase + erasure receipt; one-person export bundle |
| Cascade-impact preview before parent delete/reassign | admin | P2 | Yes | No | Compute dependent-row counts per child entity; require confirm; never orphan |
| Standardize audit columns (FK-typed actor, updated_by everywhere) | both | P1 | Yes | No | Migrate audit cols to bigint FK to user_master; resolve created_by-vs-assignee |
| Record source / provenance flags (import vs manual vs API) | both | P2 | Yes | No | `source` enum + `import_batch_id` on every write |
| Data lineage on every record (first-seen, batch, last-modified source) | both | P2 | Yes | No | Stamp source + batch_id FK so any subset traces to origin |
| Unify fragmented activity timeline into one event stream | both | P2 | No | No (needs DB verify) | One append-only event table + backfill; per-record timeline = one query |
| Referential integrity for polymorphic associations | both | P2 | No | No (needs DB verify) | CHECK exactly-one association col + FK/trigger + orphan cleanup |
| Audit-table growth control / retention | admin | P2 | No | No (needs DB verify) | Partition + scheduled prune/archive of `*_audit` shadow tables |
| Data backup + point-in-time restore (app-level) | admin | P1 | No | No (needs server) | Admin-triggered + scheduled per-module CSV ZIP via notify-service; document Supabase PITR |
| Scheduled / recurring exports emailed on cadence | both | P2 | No | No (needs job runner) | Export config + notify-service cron emails the file |
| Job/scheduler infra for background data jobs | both | P2 | No | No | `job` table + worker in notify-service (status/progress/result/retry) |
| Read-only analyst API / webhooks for BI | analyst | P2 | No | No | Scoped revocable read-only API keys + outbound webhooks |
| Bulk reassign hardening (cascade warning, progress, cancel) | admin | P2 | Yes | No | "Also reassigns N contacts" warning + shared progress/cancel UI |

---

## 5. SAFE TO BUILD NOW shortlist (pure-frontend / read-only — no blocker exposure)

These touch no non-owned writes (or only a narrow admin-scoped restore), so they ship without waiting on the `created_by != assignee` ownership fix. Recommended first wave, roughly in build order:

1. **CSV formula-injection hardening on export** — one-file fix in `ExportButton.tsx` (security, trivial, covers all 5 modules).
2. **Progress bar + cancel on bulk operations** — thread `onProgress`/`AbortSignal` through existing loops in `bulkActions.ts`/`assignment.ts`.
3. **Bulk-action audit receipt + history** — write the `data_batch` row (the same record that later powers undo/redo) and a viewable history.
4. **Partial-failure surfacing + retry-failed-subset** — surface failed IDs + reasons, offer retry/CSV.
5. **Import mapping/preview wizard (frontend only)** — header parse, auto-match, 3-row preview; submits to the (later) endpoint.
6. **PII export gating + export-log read/replay** — reuse `contact_master_masked` logic; "replay this export".
7. **Recycle-bin list + restore** — read `deleted_date IS NOT NULL`; restore is a narrow admin write, low blast radius.
8. **Named saved filters / segments** — `saved_segment` table; read-only over list data.
9. **No-code report / pivot builder** + **funnel/conversion analytics** + **customizable dashboards** + **calculated/derived fields** — the analyst suite, all read-only.
10. **Field-level change-history render** (History tab) + **data-quality command center** + **consent/DNC fields & badges** + **mandatory-reason capture** + **edit-form validation parity** + **contact↔company enrichment auto-fill**.

Everything that **writes non-owned rows** — the real import commit, undo/redo apply, generalized bulk edit, delete/merge — should be built **behind the service-role `requireAdmin` endpoint** (the pattern already at `server.js:771`) so it ships as an **admin tool now**, and only the **agent-facing** version waits on the ownership fix.
